scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.build:server: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.build:client: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc -p packages/shared && npx tsc --noEmit -p server && npx tsc --noEmit -p client
